tooltip.text: Run EVEBot
Pause EVEBot

onPress.code: relay all -event EVEBot_HARDSTOP "${Me.Name} - ${Script[EVEBot].VariableScope.Config.Common.CurrentBehavior} - Broadcast Break Button";Script[EVEBot].VariableScope.Logger:Log["Broadcast Break button forcing break!!!", LOG_MINOR]
Social.NextBreak:Set[0];Social.OnBreak:Set[FALSE];relay all -event EVEBot_ABORTHARDSTOP;Script[EVEBot].VariableScope.Logger:Log["Broadcast resume button resuming from break!!!", LOG_MINOR]
relay all EVEBot:Resume["Resume via UI BroadcastRun"]

tooltip.text: This will set the amount of drones you want in your drone bay.
The maximum hours to run the script before it aborts.
Enter an server address if you want to use IRC
Enter an channel name if you want to use IRC
Enter an username if you want to use IRC
Enter a password if you need one to use IRC
Enable audio events
Disable EVE 3D Rendering
Sort asteroid belt lists randomly, instead of alphabetically
Strip Mine the immediate area to nothing before moving
Will bookmark the last mining location when the hold fills, and return to that spot after emptying the hold.
Maximum slowboat distance is mining range * this
Cargo hold >= this value means cargo hold full
When checked only one laser will be activated per locked asteroid.  Uncheck to focus all lasers on a single asteroid.  In general, this should be checked.
When checked the miner will warp to asteroid belt bookmarks instead of the belts themselves.  See the labels Tab for bookmark prefix requirements.
When checked mining drones will be used instead of combat drones
Minimum distance we will keep other players at
When checked you will move to another field when and if a player enters yours and is below the standing you set. (Doesn't Include Gang Members)
When checked this will be the master in group mining, You should only have one master
Check to mine ICE Fields instead of Asteroid Fields.
When checked will tell evebot to mine as a group
When checked this will have your orca tractor and loot wrecks (Must have a tractor beam)
When checked will tell evebot to stay within range of specific person listed below
Move to another field when a player enters yours and is below the security status you set
When this is checked miners will attempt to compress ore
When checked will tell evebot to stay within boost range of the master
When this is checked, someone not running evebot is running compression
Type of the destination to delivery to, such as POS, Station, Outpost, etc
When checked this will force your miners to wait until the pilot specified in Location Name is within 20km before dropping a jetcan.
Either enter the delivery location here, or it will default to the last station we undock at
Station bookmark where you want to dock if something goes terribly wrong.  Can be in a different system.
Turn Shield Booster on full-time, instead of on-demand.
Launch and Use Combat Drones
Will chain high value spawns if checked
If not checked chaining will be suspended if you are alone in a system.
Keeps the ratter stationary, ignores belts and players
Warp to Ammo Bookmark to restock ammunition?
Orbit the current NPC target?
Attempt to calculate optimal?
KeepAtRange the current NPC target?
Attempt to calculate optimal?
Loot the rats you kill
Request Drone Defense from fleet - to respond, also enable launch combat drones, otherwise it's request only
We will return to base when available drones falls below this number
What range to warp to belts at. Default is 0
NPC ships with a bounty above this value will be chained (if enabled).
Distance you want to orbit the current target
Distance you want to Keep the current target At Range
Name of bookmark where the ammo can is located.
How much free space to leave in cargo after restocking ammo
This will be the Anom type we rat over and over again.
When checked, the hauler will wait at dropoff location for orca to broadcast cargo used. When unchecked, hauler will cycle endlessly without breaks.
The name of the fleet member flying your orca
The bookmark name for the mining system location.
The prefix for safe spot bookmark names.
The prefix for ore belt bookmark names.
The prefix for ice belt bookmark names.
The prefix for Ammo bookmark names.
The string that undock insta bookmarks will contain. 1 space will be prepended and appended.
The string that dock insta bookmarks will contain. 1 space will be prepended and appended.
The destination bookmark or station name.
The prefix for source bookmark names.
Leave blank to service all regions.
Bookmarks which will be visited to pickup items
If checked, Evebot will manage your fleet
If checked, this character will invite your fleet.  Don't set more than one!
Use this to add members to your fleet.  They must be in your corporation or in your contacts list.
If checked, this character will be moved to Wing 2.  Used for people you don't want warped with your fleet.
These characters will be added to your fleet if EVEBot can find them in your Corporation or Contacts and "I am Leader" is checked.
If checked, accept and complete courier missions.
If checked, accept and complete trade missions.
If checked, accept and complete mining missions.
If checked, accept and complete kill missions.
Small Hauler (6000 m^3 or less).
Large Hauler (more than 6000 m^3).
Mining Ship.
Combat Ship.
Solo = switch to salvage ship.  Relay = relay to salvage bot.
Ship to use for solo salvaging.
If checked, avoid missions that go into low-sec.
Will use the large hauler for missions above this limit.
If checked, run to safe spot when low on ammo.
If checked, run to safe spot when capacitor is empty.
If checked, run to safe spot when tank (shield or armor) has failed.
If checked, run to a station instead of a safe-spot.
If checked, run to safe spot when any non-whitelisted pilot enters system.
If checked, "bad" standings will be checked for whitelisting before fleeing.
If checked, run to safe spot when any blacklisted pilot enters system.
The lowest standing pilot we tolerate in system before we flee. It goes to -11!

children.name: cbIncludeNeutralInCalc
children.content: Include Neutral (0.0) standings in standings check

tooltip.text: If checked, include all 0.0 standings (includes corp, alliance, and personal)
Lowest armor percent allowed before fleeing
Lowest Shield Pct Allowed before Running
Lowest capacitor percent allowed before fleeing

children.name: cbSafeCooldown
children.content: Wait               minutes after unsafe pilots have left system

tooltip.text: If checked, will dock your ship at your panic location every for a break according to the information specified.  Restart after changing these values.

children.name: cbBreaks
children.content: Take a break for               hours every                hours.

tooltip.text: If checked, will dock your ship at your panic location every for a break according to the information specified.  Restart after changing these values.
If checked, will broadcast break to all sessions.

children.name: txtPilotInfo
children.text: Select a pilot from the list at left.

children.name: txtCorpInfo
children.text: This will populate with stuff based on your selection.

children.name: txtAllianceInfo
children.text: This will show you alliance stuff.
